title: bouncy-qq romantic russian fermented black beans roast
description: a dish featuring rich herbal flavors from fermented black beans and a satisfying roast, dairy-free-friendly and served in an agave-leaf vessel

ingredients.name: fermented black beans
ingredients.notes: use store-bought or home-made fermented black beans

ingredients.name: fresh thyme
ingredients.notes: use fresh thyme for the best flavor

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: use kosher or sea salt for added flavor

ingredients.name: black pepper
ingredients.notes: use freshly ground black pepper for the best flavor

instructions: in a large bowl, combine the fermented black beans, caraway seeds, thyme, salt, and black pepper.
transfer the mixture to an agave-leaf vessel or a baking dish.
drizzle with olive oil and apple cider vinegar.
roast in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the beans are tender and caramelized.
remove from the oven and drizzle with agave nectar.
serve immediately, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
